applicability_boundary.admitted_family: Gaussian-OU toy world with lab-local hidden-debt assessment.
applicability_boundary.claim_scope: The interaction result applies only to the listed Gaussian-OU family, model, sample-count grid, debt grid, seed schedule, and quality_q construction.
applicability_boundary.metric_behavior_range: Reported only for finite measured quality_q values produced by the debt, metric, and ledger path; slope fitting fails closed for non-finite values, constant grids, or insufficient points.
applicability_boundary.model: Deterministic standardized linear reader over synthetic Gaussian-OU samples.

interaction_test.hypothesis: per-sample_count degradation slope 95% confidence intervals share a common overlap
interaction_test.negative_result_note: The experiment reports the measured CI-overlap outcome directly; no debt-level, sample-count, or seed setting is tuned after observing the result.
